service_list.name: Custom Roof Flashings
service_list.brief: Custom roof flashings can be drawn online and ordered through Roofing Depot's flashing drawing tool.

service_list.name: Custom Sheetmetal Work and Rainwater Goods
service_list.brief: Roofing Depot fabricates complex rainheads, sumps, odd-shaped metal jobs and rainwater goods for the public, tradespeople and professionals.

service_list.name: Roof Supplies
service_list.brief: Roofing Depot offers a one-stop shop for roof supplies, tools and accessories for current and upcoming projects.

service_list.name: Roof Sheeting
service_list.brief: Roof sheeting products include corrugated, 5 Rib and 9 Rib options.

service_list.name: Architectural Panels
service_list.brief: Architectural panel products include Nail Strip, Interlocking Panel and Standing Seam.

service_list.name: Rainwater Goods
service_list.brief: Rainwater goods include rainwater heads, guttering, downpipes and accessories.

service_list.name: Tools
service_list.brief: Roofing tools include seaming, measuring, snips, hammers, scribers, fold and bend, mark and measure, and seaming and hemming tools.

service_list.name: Consumables
service_list.brief: Consumables include roofing screws, silicone, silicone accessories, screws and fixings, rivets and clips.

service_list.name: Weather Protection
service_list.brief: Weather protection products include insulation and sarking.

service_list.name: Insulated Roof Panels
service_list.brief: Roofing Depot distributes Apollo Patios insulated roof panels including Corrugated Insulated Roofing and Trimlink Insulated Roofing.

service_list.name: Battens
service_list.brief: Roofing Depot lists battens as part of its roofing product category.

items: Distributor for Apollo Patios insulated roof panels

brief.redesign_brief: Keep Roofing Depot's strongest assets: the clear trade-focused product range, custom flashing drawing tool, Coombabah showroom details, fast turnaround promise, Australian Made and Owned trust badge, and practical positioning around standing seam, roof flashings and roof supplies. Improve the site by tightening copy, removing placeholder and duplicate content, fixing inconsistent offers and address formatting, elevating product categories, making the custom flashing workflow easier to understand, and clarifying ecommerce/account functionality. The redesign matters because this business combines local fabrication, specialist trade knowledge and online ordering, but the current site buries that value behind cluttered navigation, repeated blocks and generic ecommerce copy.

ready_to_build_concerns: No real testimonials found in scraped pages.
No owner name, founded year, ABN, QBCC or licence number found in scraped pages.
Address appears in inconsistent formats: '5/610 Pine Ridge Road, Coombabah QLD 4216' and '5 / 610 Pine Ridge Rd, Coombabah Q 4216'.
Promotional/free shipping thresholds conflict: free delivery over $100, free shipping over $110, and join now for 10% off.
Shop contains placeholder or malformed text, including 'Snips & PliersLorem Ipsum...'.
Custom flashing drawing tool and WooCommerce account/ecommerce flows increase build complexity.
Some footer service claims appear generic, including 'Online Support 24 hours a day, 7 days a week' and 'Money Guarantee Within 30 days for an exchange'.
